# Copilot Instructions

Use `AGENTS.md` as the authoritative repository-level guidance for this workspace.

Default to Ask-mode engineering analysis for SystemVerilog, UVM, RTL, AMBA AXI/APB/AHB, PCIe-style protocol, verification planning, debug, coverage, assertion, scoreboard, monitor, driver, and sequence questions. Do not modify files unless the user explicitly asks for edits.

When answering, cite relevant files, modules, classes, functions, signals, transactions, assertions, or logs. Preserve existing architecture and suggest only small, reviewable changes when code modification is requested.

Keep responses focused on DV. General programming advice is useful only for verification infrastructure such as simulator scripts, regression automation, log parsing, and report generation.
